forecast_ensemble.assumptions: Revenue = sum(TAM_segment * penetration_segment). Each segment follows Bass diffusion with segment-specific TAM ceiling. Growth decelerates as segments approach saturation. Claude Code near developer TAM ceiling; enterprise API still has runway. Consumer subscription limited by ChatGPT dominance.

revenue_points.notes: Full year 2022 revenue ~$28M; $540M losses on $28M revenue
CFO retrospective: $2B ARR for full year 2023
Estimated ~$1.6B ARR around Dec 2023
CFO retrospective: $6B ARR for full year 2024
Detailed breakdown: ChatGPT Plus $1.9B (56%), Enterprise $714M (21%), API $496M (15%), Other $290M (8%)
$5.5B ARR by end of 2024
CFO retrospective: $6B ARR at start of 2025; matches 2024 full-year figure
Company spokesperson confirmed $10B ARR; excludes Microsoft licensing and one-time deals

>$1B/mo monthly recurring revenue; implies >$12B annualized, using ~$13B midpoint
CFO retrospective: $20B+ annualized by end of 2025
The Information reported $21.4B annualized at end of Dec 2025
Actual recognized 2025 revenue $13.1B; beat $10B projection; significant gap vs $20B+ annualized

$2B/mo (~$24B annualized); disclosed in Apr 2026 fundraising; enterprise now 40% of revenue (CRO Dresser)

comparability_params.description: Parameters for adjusting revenue between gross and net reporting bases

gross_to_net.notes: Estimated 25% take-rate by AWS/Google on cloud-resold revenue; ~40% of Anthropic revenue flows through cloud channels. Adjusts: net = gross - (gross * cloud_channel_pct * cloud_partner_take_rate)
sources: Sacra: Anthropic reports cloud reseller revenue on gross basis
OpenAI CRO Dresser (Apr 2026): alleged ~$8B inflation via gross reporting
Yahoo Finance / Josipa Majic Predin (Mar 2026): confirmed gross reporting

net_to_gross.notes: OpenAI pays Microsoft ~20% revenue share on Azure-distributed revenue; estimated ~30% of OpenAI revenue flows through Azure. Adjusts: gross = net / (1 - azure_channel_pct * microsoft_share_rate / (1 + azure_channel_pct * microsoft_share_rate)). Simplified: gross ≈ net + (net * azure_channel_pct * microsoft_share_rate)
sources: CNBC/Reuters (Jun 2025): OpenAI figures exclude Microsoft licensing
Khosla Ventures Ethan Choi (Mar 2026): net reporting confirmed
SEC filings: Microsoft revenue share terms
